(embedded source map)\n```\nThis pattern is common for aggregating modules and facilitating easier imports. The embedded source map is also typical in bundled or transpiled code to aid debugging.\n\n---\n\n### Confirmations:\n- **Issues in the code?**  \n  No. The code is straightforward, with no dynamic execution, data processing, or external inputs. The embedded source map is a static comment, not affecting runtime behavior.\n\n### Flaws or Mistakes in the Reports:\n- **Logical errors or reasoning flaws?**  \n  The reports are consistent and accurate.
